info.description: PXE Boot Provisioning and Node Management System API.
info.title: OS Baka API

get.description: List all API keys (hashes are never exposed)

post.description: Create a new API key. The full key is only returned once.
Generate a new key value for an existing API key. Old key is invalidated.

get.description: Returns paginated audit log entries, newest first

parameters.description: Filter by action prefix (e.g. node, user, dhcp)
parameters.name: action

post.description: Authenticate user and return access token

get.description: Get details of the currently logged-in user
Aggregated statistics for the dashboard overview

get.summary: Get a DHCP configuration by ID

post.summary: Sync DHCP reservations from registered nodes

post.description: Called by node agents to report health status. Internal API.

put.description: Update the status of a node (internal API)

get.description: Get a list of all registered server nodes

post.description: Delete multiple nodes and their DHCP reservations

put.description: Assign multiple nodes to a group (or unassign by passing null group_id)
put.summary: Bulk assign nodes to a group

post.description: Set multiple nodes to 'installing' status for reinstallation

put.summary: Assign a node to a group

get.description: Test if the node's IPMI/BMC is reachable and credentials are valid

post.description: Send a power command (on/off/reset/cycle/status) to a node via IPMI
Set node status to 'installing' to trigger reinstallation on next boot
Generate a new passphrase, store it in the secret store, and return it

put.summary: Set tags for a node (replaces all existing tags)

get.description: Returns an iPXE script based on the node's MAC address
get.summary: Get iPXE boot script for a node

get.description: Returns a static iPXE script that chains to the dynamic boot script using iPXE variables
Returns a script to run after OS installation
Returns a preseed file for automated installation

get.summary: List network interfaces on the server

post.description: Create a new user with the given credentials (admin only)

put.description: Update user details (admin only, or self for non-privileged fields)

delete.description: Delete a user (admin only, cannot delete self)

put.description: Change password for a user. Admins can change any user's password without providing old password.

get.description: WebSocket endpoint for interactive SSH sessions

parameters.description: JWT token (optional, for browser clients that cannot set headers)
parameters.name: token

next_server.description: Next server IP (usually same as TFTP)
